sequence.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General
sequence.description: Sequence called from DNB_POLITIET_Report. Deletes (cascade): - all objects in status 4 - which means Delete

parameter.value: SELECT CREATION_ORDER, INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_NAME, INTERNAL_REPORT_ID, REPORT_ID, NODE_ID, DELETE_ACTION FROM V_DNB_POLITIET_OBJECTS_TO_DELETE ORDER BY CREATION_ORDER

sequence.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General_Delete
sequence.description: Processes rows from V_DNB_POLITIET_OBJECTS_TO_DELETE in CREATION_ORDER. Object types: REPORT, PERSON, ORGANIZATION, TRANSACTION, ACCOUNT, ACTIVITY, ADDRESS, DOCUMENT_HEADER, DOCUMENT, CONTACT, LINK, INDICATOR. Sends DELETE to API then calls DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_WITH_CASCADE.

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General_Delete_Send_REPORT
sequence-function.description: Send DELETE REST message to externalConnectorName

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General_Delete_Send_NODES
sequence-function.description: Send DELETE REST message to externalConnectorName

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General_Delete_Send_ADDRESS
sequence-function.description: Send DELETE REST message to externalConnectorName

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General_Delete_Send_DOCUMENT_HEADER
sequence-function.description: Send DELETE REST message to externalConnectorName

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General_Delete_Send_DOCUMENT
sequence-function.description: Send DELETE REST message to externalConnectorName

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General_Delete_Send_CONTACT
sequence-function.description: Send DELETE REST message to externalConnectorName

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General_Delete_Send_LINK
sequence-function.description: Send DELETE REST message to externalConnectorName

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General_Delete_Send_INDICATOR
sequence-function.description: Send DELETE REST message to externalConnectorName

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_General_Delete_UpdateCascade
sequence-function.description: Calls DNB_POLITIET_DELETE_WITH_CASCADE(OBJECT_NAME, INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_ID, DELETE_ACTION). Clears Politiet IDs and updates status.

parameter.value: INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID=[INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID]|OBJECT_ID=[OBJECT_ID]|OBJECT_NAME=[OBJECT_NAME]|LOG_CODE=INFO|LOG_SEQUENCE_NAME=[reserved.sequenceName]|REPORT_ID=[REPORT_ID]|LOG_DETAILS=[OBJECT_NAME] with id [OBJECT_ID] ([INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID]), REPORT_ID=[REPORT_ID] deleted with cascade. |INTERNAL_REPORT_ID=[INTERNAL_REPORT_ID]

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_ERROR_handling_General_UPDATE_ByObject
sequence-function.description: Updates entity table to status 99 using DNB_POLITIET_ERROR_UPDATE_STATUS. Table/columns from DNB_POLITIET_OBJECTS.

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_ERROR_handling_ReportVerification_UPDATE
sequence-function.description: Change the status to 98 to avoid re-try to send wrong message several times.

parameter.value: UPDATE DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS SET REPORT_ID = CASE WHEN [ERROR_MESSAGE] LIKE '%Not Found%' THEN NULL ELSE REPORT_ID END, LATEST_ACTION=[ERROR_MESSAGE], LATEST_ACTION_TIMESTAMP=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, VERIFICATION_RESPONSE=TO_CLOB([ERROR_RESPONSE_BODY]), HTTP_STATUS_CODE = [HTTP_STATUS_CODE], API_ERROR_MESSAGE = CASE WHEN [HTTP_STATUS_CODE] = '400' THEN JSON_VALUE([ERROR_RESPONSE_BODY], '$.melding') ELSE NULL END, API_ERROR_CODE = CASE WHEN [HTTP_STATUS_CODE] = '400' THEN JSON_VALUE([ERROR_RESPONSE_BODY], '$.kode') ELSE NULL END, STATUS= CASE WHEN [HTTP_STATUS_CODE] = '400' THEN 6 ELSE 98 END -- e.g. status 404 is "Not Found" WHERE INTERNAL_REPORT_ID=[INTERNAL_REPORT_ID]

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_ERROR_handling_StatusVerification_UPDATE
sequence-function.description: Change the status to 98 to avoid re-try to send wrong message several times.

parameter.value: UPDATE DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS SET LATEST_ACTION=[ERROR_MESSAGE], LATEST_ACTION_TIMESTAMP=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, HTTP_STATUS_CODE = [HTTP_STATUS_CODE], API_ERROR_MESSAGE = CASE WHEN [HTTP_STATUS_CODE] <> '409' THEN JSON_VALUE([ERROR_RESPONSE_BODY], '$.melding') ELSE NULL END, API_ERROR_CODE = CASE WHEN [HTTP_STATUS_CODE] <> '409' THEN JSON_VALUE([ERROR_RESPONSE_BODY], '$.kode') ELSE NULL END, VERIFICATION_STATUS_INFO= TO_CLOB([ERROR_RESPONSE_BODY]), STATUS= CASE WHEN [HTTP_STATUS_CODE] = '409' THEN 7 ELSE 98 END WHERE INTERNAL_REPORT_ID=[INTERNAL_REPORT_ID]

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_ERROR_handling_Submit_UPDATE
sequence-function.description: Change the status to 97.

parameter.value: UPDATE DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS SET REPORT_ID = CASE WHEN [ERROR_MESSAGE] LIKE '%Not Found%' THEN NULL ELSE REPORT_ID END, LATEST_ACTION=[ERROR_MESSAGE], LATEST_ACTION_TIMESTAMP=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, HTTP_STATUS_CODE = [HTTP_STATUS_CODE], API_ERROR_MESSAGE = JSON_VALUE([ERROR_RESPONSE_BODY], '$.melding'), API_ERROR_CODE = JSON_VALUE([ERROR_RESPONSE_BODY], '$.kode'), VERIFICATION_RESPONSE='{}', STATUS=97 WHERE INTERNAL_REPORT_ID=[INTERNAL_REPORT_ID]

SELECT x.INTERNAL_REPORT_ID, x.INTERNAL_REPORT_ID as INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID, x.REPORT_ID, x.REPORT_ID as OBJECT_ID, 'REPORT' AS OBJECT_NAME FROM DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS x WHERE x.REPORT_ID IS NOT NULL AND x.STATUS=3 AND x.JSON_FULL_REPORT IS NULL

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_GET_Reports_ReadData_RC
sequence-function.description: Moving JSONData to the record from sequence context. This function is required for any message bigger than 4k.

parameter.value: UPDATE DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS SET JSON_FULL_REPORT_LUT=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, JSON_FULL_REPORT=[JSONData] WHERE REPORT_ID=[REPORT_ID]

sequence.name: DNB_POLITIET_GET_StatusVerification
sequence.description: Sequence which try to send call for status info for reports in status 77

parameter.value: SELECT x.INTERNAL_REPORT_ID, x.INTERNAL_REPORT_ID as INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID, x.REPORT_ID, x.REPORT_ID as OBJECT_ID, 'REPORT' AS OBJECT_NAME FROM DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS x WHERE x.REPORT_ID IS NOT NULL AND x.STATUS = 77 ORDER BY x.CREATION_TIMESTAMP

UPDATE DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS SET STATUS=7, LATEST_ACTION='Report status received', LATEST_ACTION_TIMESTAMP=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, HTTP_STATUS_CODE = [HTTP_STATUS_CODE], API_ERROR_MESSAGE = NULL, API_ERROR_CODE = NULL, VERIFICATION_STATUS_INFO=TO_CLOB([JSONData]) WHERE INTERNAL_REPORT_ID=[INTERNAL_REPORT_ID]

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_GET_meta_CallSequence
sequence-function.description: Populate staging table DNB_POLITIET_META_TMP

parameter.value: SELECT META_TYPE_NAME, META_TYPE_PATH FROM DNB_POLITIET_META_TYPES WHERE ACTIVE='Y' ORDER BY META_TYPE_NAME

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_GET_meta_DELETE
sequence-function.description: Transfer data from staging table DNB_POLITIET_META_TMP

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_GET_meta_INSERT
sequence-function.description: Transfer data from staging table DNB_POLITIET_META_TMP

parameter.value: INSERT INTO DNB_POLITIET_META SELECT * FROM DNB_POLITIET_META_TMP

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_GET_meta_ReadData_GET
sequence-function.description: Call External Connector with RC META_PATH

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_GET_meta_ReadData_RC
sequence-function.description: Moving JSONData to the record from sequence context. This function is required for any message bigger than 4k.

parameter.value: UPDATE DNB_POLITIET_META_TYPES_TMP SET META_TYPE_DATA=[JSONData] WHERE META_TYPE_NAME=[META_TYPE_NAME] AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DNB_POLITIET_META_TYPES_TMP WHERE META_TYPE_NAME=[META_TYPE_NAME])

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_GET_meta_ReadData_InsertResponse_ExecProc
sequence-function.description: Reading data from JSON response stored in DNB_POLITIET_META_TYPES_TMP.META_TYPE_DATA, and saving in table DNB_POLITIET_META_TMP is performed in DB procedure DNB_INSERT_POLITIET_META_PROC.

parameter.value: INSERT INTO DNB_POLITIET_LOG ( LOG_TIMESTAMP, LOG_CODE, LOG_SEQUENCE_NAME, LOG_DETAILS, INTERNAL_REPORT_ID, INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_NAME, REPORT_ID, OBJECT_NAME_FROM, OBJECT_NAME_TO, NODE_NAME, NODE_ID, JSON_MESSAGE ) VALUES ( CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, [LOG_CODE], [LOG_SEQUENCE_NAME], [LOG_DETAILS] || [ERROR_MESSAGE], [INTERNAL_REPORT_ID], [INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID], [OBJECT_ID], [OBJECT_NAME], [REPORT_ID], [OBJECT_NAME_FROM], [OBJECT_NAME_TO], [NODE_NAME], [NODE_ID], [JSONData] )

SELECT x.INTERNAL_REPORT_ID, x.INTERNAL_REPORT_ID as INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID, x.REPORT_ID, x.REPORT_ID as OBJECT_ID, 'REPORT' AS OBJECT_NAME FROM DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS x WHERE x.REPORT_ID IS NOT NULL AND x.STATUS = 2 ORDER BY x.CREATION_TIMESTAMP
SELECT JSON_MESSAGE_PATCH, REPORT_ID FROM DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS WHERE INTERNAL_REPORT_ID=[INTERNAL_REPORT_ID]

UPDATE DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS SET REPORT_ID=[REPORT_ID], STATUS=3, LATEST_ACTION='Report updated', LATEST_ACTION_TIMESTAMP=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, HTTP_STATUS_CODE = [HTTP_STATUS_CODE], API_ERROR_MESSAGE = NULL, API_ERROR_CODE = NULL WHERE INTERNAL_REPORT_ID=[INTERNAL_REPORT_ID]

sequence.name: DNB_POLITIET_POST_General
sequence.description: Unified sequence: reads from V_DNB_POLITIET_OBJECTS_TO_POST and for each row calls the type-specific Send sequence (Reports, Persons, Organizations, etc.) in CREATION_ORDER.

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_POST_General_CallSequence
sequence-function.description: Select from V_DNB_POLITIET_OBJECTS_TO_POST; for each row call DNB_POLITIET_POST_General_Send which routes to the correct POST_*_Send by OBJECT_NAME.

parameter.value: SELECT INTERNAL_REPORT_ID, REPORT_ID, INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_NAME, NODE_ID, NODE_NAME, DOCUMENT_HEADER_ID FROM V_DNB_POLITIET_OBJECTS_TO_POST ORDER BY CREATION_ORDER

sequence.name: DNB_POLITIET_POST_General_Send
sequence.description: Router: calls the type-specific POST_*_Send sequence based on OBJECT_NAME. Row columns match what each Send sequence expects (type-specific INTERNAL_*_ID from V_DNB_POLITIET_OBJECTS_TO_POST).

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_POST_General_Send_GetData
sequence-function.description: Calls procedure DNB_POLITIET_GET_JSON to get JSON_MESSAGE as a CLOB.

parameter.value: SELECT JSON_VALUE( [JSONData], '$.id') AS OBJECT_ID FROM DUAL

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_POST_General_Send_Update
sequence-function.description: Calls procedure DNB_POLITIET_POST_UPDATE_STATUS to update STATUS.

sequence.name: DNB_POLITIET_POST_ReportVerifications
sequence.description: Sequence which try to send all verifications messages for reports in status 5 (Ready for verification)

parameter.value: SELECT x.INTERNAL_REPORT_ID, x.INTERNAL_REPORT_ID as INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID, x.REPORT_ID, x.REPORT_ID as OBJECT_ID, 'REPORT' AS OBJECT_NAME FROM DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS x WHERE x.REPORT_ID IS NOT NULL AND x.STATUS = 5 ORDER BY x.CREATION_TIMESTAMP
SELECT JSON_VALUE( [JSONData], '$.kode') AS VER_RESPONSE_CODE, JSON_VALUE( [JSONData], '$.melding') AS VER_RESPONSE_TEXT FROM DUAL

UPDATE DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS SET STATUS=7, LATEST_ACTION='Report verified', LATEST_ACTION_TIMESTAMP=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, HTTP_STATUS_CODE = [HTTP_STATUS_CODE], API_ERROR_MESSAGE = NULL, API_ERROR_CODE = NULL, VERIFICATION_RESPONSE=[JSONData] WHERE INTERNAL_REPORT_ID=[INTERNAL_REPORT_ID]

sequence.name: DNB_POLITIET_POST_Submit
sequence.description: Sequence which try to send submit messages for reports in status 8 (Ready for submission)

parameter.value: SELECT x.INTERNAL_REPORT_ID, x.INTERNAL_REPORT_ID as INTERNAL_OBJECT_ID, x.REPORT_ID, x.REPORT_ID as OBJECT_ID, 'REPORT' AS OBJECT_NAME FROM DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS x WHERE x.REPORT_ID IS NOT NULL AND x.STATUS = 8 ORDER BY x.CREATION_TIMESTAMP

UPDATE DNB_POLITIET_REPORTS SET STATUS=9, LATEST_ACTION='Report submitted', LATEST_ACTION_TIMESTAMP=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, HTTP_STATUS_CODE = [HTTP_STATUS_CODE], API_ERROR_MESSAGE = NULL, API_ERROR_CODE = NULL WHERE INTERNAL_REPORT_ID=[INTERNAL_REPORT_ID]

sequence.name: DNB_POLITIET_Report
sequence.description: Sequence is called from scheduleconfig_POLITIET.xml, group DNB_POLITIET_Report every 10s.

sequence-function.name: DNB_POLITIET_Report_Call_DELETE_General
sequence-function.description: Call sequence which deletes (cascade): - all objects in status 4 - which means Delete
